_meta.selection_criteria: Mix of vulnerability fixes, auth issues, API bugs, and security hardening
_meta.source: Curated from real open-source security bugs (CVE-based and common patterns)
_meta.note: Tasks represent common backend security patterns. Setup scripts create vulnerable state for agent to fix.

tasks.description: Fix SQL injection vulnerability in user login endpoint
Fix stored XSS in comment submission handler
Fix authentication bypass via JWT algorithm confusion
Fix path traversal in file download endpoint
Add CSRF protection to state-changing API endpoints
Implement rate limiting for login and password reset endpoints
Fix SSRF vulnerability in URL preview feature
Fix insecure deserialization in session handler
Fix broken access control allowing users to view other users data
Fix API error responses leaking stack traces and internal paths
Upgrade password hashing from MD5 to bcrypt with migration
Fix HTTP header injection in redirect handler
